definitions.text: The outer side of a window or door frame.
A revelation; an uncovering of what was hidden in the scene or story.
examples: The comedian had been telling us about his sleep being disturbed by noise. Then came the reveal: he was sleeping on a bed in a department store.

definitions.text: To uncover; to show and display that which was hidden.
To communicate that which could not be known or discovered without divine or supernatural instruction.
